for-agents.automate_ticket_title: GreenBus – automate ticket sales and manage transportation!
for-agents.automate_ticket_text: On this page, you will find all the necessary information, tools, and resources for successful operation. We invite agencies involved in selling tickets for international passenger transport, as well as companies working in the employment sector in Europe, to collaborate.

why_join_us_text.personal_account_text: Each partner can create their own agent network and increase their income.
why_join_us_text.direct_collaboration_text: Earn from ticket sales directly from carriers.
why_join_us_text.no_limits_or_quotas_text: Earn from 10% on each ticket sold and enjoy a stable income.

for-agents.features_text: GreenBus offers extensive opportunities for partners: an efficient ticket sales system, access to a network of carriers, and a stable income. We support our partners at every stage, providing all the necessary tools for business success.
for-agents.faq_q1: Who can become a GreenBus agent?
for-agents.faq_a1: A travel agency, a ticket office or an entrepreneur who wants to sell bus tickets online through the GreenBus platform can become an agent.
for-agents.faq_q2: What does a GreenBus agent get?
for-agents.faq_a2: An agent gets access to partner carriers’ trips, online ticket-sales tools, a personal dashboard and a commission for sold tickets.
for-agents.faq_q3: How much does onboarding cost for an agent?
for-agents.faq_a3: Terms are calculated individually depending on sales volume. Leave a request and we will send the cooperation terms.
for-agents.faq_q4: How does an agent sell tickets?
for-agents.faq_a4: After onboarding you sell tickets via a convenient dashboard: find a trip, reserve a seat and issue a ticket for the passenger online.
for-agents.faq_q5: How do I become an agent?
for-agents.faq_a5: Fill in the request form on this page — a GreenBus manager will contact you and help with onboarding.
